response:
```sql
WITH 
  monthly_signups AS (
    SELECT 
      EXTRACT(MONTH FROM created_at) AS month,
      EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) AS year,
      COUNT(id) AS num_signups
    FROM 
      users
    GROUP BY 
      EXTRACT(MONTH FROM created_at),
      EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at)
  ),
  monthly_growth AS (
    SELECT 
      year,
      month,
      num_signups,
      LAG(num_signups) OVER (ORDER BY year, month) AS prev_month_signups
    FROM 
      monthly_signups
  )
SELECT 
  year,
  month,
  num_signups,
  ROUND(
    (num_signups - prev_month_signups) / NULLIF(prev_month_signups, 0) * 100, 
    2
  ) AS growth_rate
FROM 
  monthly_growth
ORDER BY 
  year, 
  month;
```
